creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ak
Date: Sat Aug 11 15:36:06 2012
New Revision: 302416
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302416

Log:
  - Update to 0.8.6
  
  PR:	ports/170534
  Submitted by:	Jin-Sih Lin <linpct@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/www/node-devel/files/patch-tools-install.py   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/node-devel/Makefile
  head/www/node-devel/distinfo

Modified: head/www/node-devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/node-devel/Makefile	Sat Aug 11 14:41:20 2012	(r302415)
+++ head/www/node-devel/Makefile	Sat Aug 11 15:36:06 2012	(r302416)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	node
-PORTVERSION=	0.8.5
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.6
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://nodejs.org/dist/v${PORTVERSION}/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-devel
@@ -34,7 +34,6 @@ REINPLACE_ARGS=	-i ''
 
 post-patch:
 	@${RM} ${WRKSRC}/tools/wafadmin/Node.py.orig
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|share/man/man1/|man/man1|' ${WRKSRC}/tools/installer.js
 
 post-install:
 	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/lib/node_modules/

Modified: head/www/node-devel/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/node-devel/distinfo	Sat Aug 11 14:41:20 2012	(r302415)
+++ head/www/node-devel/distinfo	Sat Aug 11 15:36:06 2012	(r302416)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (node-v0.8.5.tar.gz) = 022a924973b15291f98b57437b53c59eaabee02348a2534259836e837f9ea6c0
-SIZE (node-v0.8.5.tar.gz) = 11848559
+SHA256 (node-v0.8.6.tar.gz) = dbd42800e69644beff5c2cf11a9d4cf6dfbd644a9a36ffdd5e8c6b8db9240854
+SIZE (node-v0.8.6.tar.gz) = 11468801

Added: head/www/node-devel/files/patch-tools-install.py
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/node-devel/files/patch-tools-install.py	Sat Aug 11 15:36:06 2012	(r302416)
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- tools/install.py.orig	2012-08-11 15:59:08.000000000 +0800
++++ tools/install.py	2012-08-11 15:59:36.000000000 +0800
+@@ -191,7 +191,7 @@
+           'deps/uv/include/uv-private/uv-unix.h',
+           'deps/uv/include/uv-private/uv-win.h'],
+           'include/node/uv-private/')
+-  action(['doc/node.1'], 'share/man/man1/')
++  action(['doc/node.1'], 'man/man1/')
+   action(['out/Release/node'], 'bin/node')
+ 
+   # install unconditionally, checking if the platform supports dtrace doesn't
